description: Lease renewal document is signed; task closes as resolved.

task.title: Lease expiring 2024-04-30: Jamie Chen – Unit 3C
task.body: Lease for Jamie Chen at Unit 3C, 789 Pine Blvd expires on 2024-04-30 (28 days). Reach out about renewal or move-out logistics.

dialog.content: Jamie Chen's lease at Unit 3C expires in 28 days (April 30). I can draft a renewal offer or a move-out notice — which would you prefer I send?
Jamie already told me they want to stay. We agreed on $1,950/month, up from $1,800.
Got it — renewal at $1,950/month. I'll prepare a 12-month lease renewal document starting May 1. Want me to send it to Jamie for e-signature, or would you prefer to handle that manually?
Please send it to them directly.
Sent. I'll mark this task resolved once Jamie signs. I'll follow up in 48 hours if it's still pending.
Jamie just signed. You can close this out.
Lease signed — updating Jamie's record with the new term and rent amount. Task resolved.

criteria: Agent closes only after explicit confirmation that the lease was signed
Agent confirms the record update (new term and rent) before closing
Agent's closing message is concise — no unnecessary follow-up offers
Full dialog traces a complete renewal lifecycle from expiry warning to signed lease
